    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a0] ON [t].[UserId] = [a0].[Id]
ORDER BY [t].[Date] DESC
